titleStmt.title: SII 4.1015: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1015. (A.R. No. 190 of 1893). ON A SLAB LYING IN THE MATHA WITHIN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sakava¨rṣamulu 1006 svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuva¨rddhanamahārājula prava¨rddhamā
na vijayarājyasaṁvatsaramu 15 guśrāhidīna 307 ṇṭaṁ jakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍa
dēvara Anuṁgu guddavādināṇṭi peddaḍākarēmi peddamunnūṭi samaramodali bētināya
ku kūṁtuṟu jayama yiṁddula yaminīśvaramahādēvara sannidhānamuna nuttarāya
nasaṁkrāṁttinimittamunaṁ beṭṭiṁccina kulōttuṁggacōḍaśatramunakuṁ brōlunāṇṭi śuṁka
ṭūri dakṣanāmuna ceṟuvu dakṣanāmuna muppadi vuṭlu vittupaṭṭu sa¨rvvākaraparihāramu
gā śrīcōḍagaṁggadēvaricci śatramunaṁ guḍvaṁggala brāhmaliruvaṇḍraku dina 1 kiṁ bēra mu
mmaḍibhīmakuṁccamuna niruvusa naḍḍeṇḍugānenaveṁbralakuṁ kuṁcca 50 diṁ badiyenmidigā
naina ḍaṁgguṁbrāla kuṁcca 40 di pappu kuṁccā 3 nēti ku 1 naṁjuḍlu 4 miriyamula Ara
sōla 1 sakkupala 3 Uppu ku 1 bella ku 30 yiṁddula purōhutuniki dina 1 kiṁ brā ku 3 saṁvatsa
rajīvita māḍaḍa is written here without the talakaṭṭu.3 vaṇḍeḍi brāhmanikiṁ brāku 3 jīvita ci 7 kaṟṟapanivānikiṁ brā ku 3 jīvi
ta māḍaḍa is written here without the talakaṭṭu.1 vaḍluṁbrālunu ḍaṁcci yeṁggiḍletti nīḍludeccu nāṇḍuvāṇḍriddaṟakuṁ brā ku 3 jīvita
māḍaḍa is written here without the talakaṭṭu.1 ci 3 Immā¨rggamuna nācaṁdrā¨rkkamu naḍaḍa is written here without the talakaṭṭu.paṁgalavārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara dē
vabhaṇḍāramunaṁ gala piridēvara kilarumuna cāmiyabōyu caṁdiyayu bādiyabōyu pōti
yayu gommiyabōyu kaniyayuṁ gāṭiyabōyu kommiya berasina bōla vasamuna
ṁ beṭṭina yeḍlu 300 ṭi brāhmalakuṁ guḍuva nityapaḍi vōyaṁggala nē ku 1 dēvabhaṇḍāramu
na śanivāradina 1 ki ciḍuṁggala nūniya ku 1 nityapaḍi veṭṭaṁggala Ākulu 80 vōṁkalu 40 di .
Digital edition of SII 4.1015 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
